section.heading: Funding

content.p: Out of any money in the Treasury of the United States not otherwise appropriated, there is hereby appropriated $100,000,000 for fiscal year 2018 to carry out this division.

section.sourceCredit: (Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 531, title XX, § 2064, as added Pub. L. 115–123, div. E, title VIII, § 50802(2), Feb. 9, 2018, 132 Stat. 282.)
